equipment.name: PV Mechanical Load Tester (MLT)
equipment.site: Reliance Dhirubhai Ambani Green Energy Giga Complex, Jamnagar

acrylic_safety_cage.ref: yellow I-beam pull frame + acrylic panels

pre_checks: Verify CDA compressor pressure within 6-7 bar
Verify safety cage door interlock closed
Verify PT100 sensors reading within ±0.5 °C of ambient
Run continuity loop test on DUT cable harness

cycle.name: DUT load
cycle.description: Place module on suction-cup grid; activate suction; verify hold

cycle.name: SMLT +
cycle.description: Pressurise pistons to +5400 Pa over 1 min; hold 60 min; record deflection

cycle.name: SMLT -
cycle.description: Pressurise pistons to -2400 Pa over 1 min; hold 60 min; record deflection

cycle.name: DMLT cycles
cycle.description: 1000 cycles of ±1000 Pa per IEC TS 62782

cycle.name: Post-EL
cycle.description: Electroluminescence scan after test; compare to baseline

cycle.name: DUT release
cycle.description: Vent suction; remove module; visual inspection

daily.value: CDA water trap drain; visual cable check

weekly.value: PT100 calibration check vs reference; load cell zero verification

quarterly.value: Pneumatic seal replacement on high-cycle pistons

annual.value: Full IEC 61215 reference test; NABL recalibration of load cells + sensors

sequence.name: Frame assembly
sequence.tasks: Cut to length, square-up jig, torque connectors to 25 Nm

sequence.name: Gantry + cable tray
sequence.tasks: Install crossbeams, route main cable tray

sequence.name: Piston grid install
sequence.tasks: Install pistons in 17x9 grid; route pneumatic manifold; leak-test

sequence.name: Suction cup re-attach (2D-bis)
sequence.tasks: Mount cups per Path γ revised plan
sequence.acceptance: All cups hold 0.6 bar vacuum for 5 min on flat plate

sequence.name: Sensor harness
sequence.tasks: Mount sensors, route harness, wire to junction box
sequence.acceptance: All sensors register in HMI within ±0.5 % of ref

sequence.name: Electrical cabinet
sequence.inputs: Drives, PLC, 24 V PSU, safety relays
sequence.tasks: Mount components, wire per drawing, ELV/LV segregation
sequence.acceptance: IR test > 50 MΩ; functional safety FAT pass

sequence.name: PLC + HMI commissioning
sequence.tasks: Upload program, configure IO, tune control loops
sequence.acceptance: All sequences run within ±1 % of setpoint

sequence.name: Empty-chamber FAT
sequence.tasks: Run full cycle without DUT; verify safety interlocks
sequence.acceptance: All safety functions test pass; no false trips

sequence.name: DUT-loaded SAT
sequence.tasks: Run IEC 61215 §10.16 cycle on reference DUT
sequence.acceptance: EL scan matches baseline; deflection within ±2 mm of FEA prediction

sequence.name: Handover
sequence.inputs: Operation manual, BoM, spare parts, training records
